cases.title: User data used to train AI
cases.description: The service uses user-generated content or personal data to train its AI/ML models without explicit opt-in.

cases.title: Mandatory arbitration clause
cases.description: Users are required to resolve disputes through binding arbitration and waive their right to a jury trial.

cases.title: Personal data sold to third parties
cases.description: The service explicitly sells or transfers personal data to third-party companies for profit.

cases.title: Class-action lawsuit waiver
cases.description: Users must waive their right to participate in class-action lawsuits against the service.

cases.title: Data shared with advertisers
cases.description: The service shares user data with advertising networks or partners for targeted marketing.

cases.title: User can delete account and data
cases.description: The service explicitly guarantees users the right to delete their account and all associated personal data.

cases.title: Users retain content ownership
cases.description: Users retain full ownership of the content they create and upload to the service.

cases.title: Service claims broad license to user content
cases.description: The service takes a very broad, royalty-free, sublicensable license to user-generated content beyond what is needed to operate.

cases.title: Liability severely limited
cases.description: The service caps its liability to users at a very low amount (e.g., $100 or the amount paid in the last month).

cases.title: Transparent and minimal data collection
cases.description: The service clearly states it collects only the minimum data necessary and never sells it to third parties.
